title: Populate department list with full academic department data

requirements.summary: Update frontend department dropdowns to display all 30+ seeded departments from the backend without truncation or layout issues
acceptanceCriteria: The department dropdown in SubmitComplaintPage shows all 30+ departments.
The department dropdown in ProfileSetupModal shows all 30+ departments.
Dropdowns are scrollable and no department name is cut off.
Selecting any department from the list correctly saves/submits the selection.

file_operations.description: Update the department dropdown to handle the full list of 30+ departments by ensuring the Select component has proper scrolling, max-height constraints, and renders all departments from useListDepartments without truncation. Verify that department selection correctly saves the departmentId to local storage and maintains the selected value in the form state.

Update the department dropdown to handle the full list of 30+ departments by ensuring the Select component has proper scrolling, max-height constraints, and renders all departments from useListDepartments without truncation. Verify that department selection correctly saves the departmentId when encoding the user profile via userProfileHelpers.encodeExtendedProfile.

Remove or comment out the deprecated static DEPARTMENTS array since departments are now fetched dynamically from the backend via useListDepartments. Add a comment explaining that department data is now managed in the backend and queried via the listDepartments endpoint.
